config.title: Kalendarz czasu pracy #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choice_list_hli #include "50200" 'section_* #include "50222"
'list_* #include "50223"
#include "50101"
function fsave dim bSave: bSave=std_fsave() if not bSave then section_fsave THIS_FILE end if fsave=bSave end function
function fopen #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
section_fopen THIS_FILE end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
dim colorDzienRob : colorDzienRob = rgb(255,255,255) dim colorDzienWolny : colorDzienWolny = rgb(192,192,192)
dim g_IdObject : g_IdObject = clng(0)
function c##CTRLID_DIAGRAM_HOST##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_DIAGRAM_HOST##_ongetdata=true if g_IdObject <> page_.root.IdObj then g_IdObject = page_.root.IdObj dim pContainer : set pContainer = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DIAGRAM_HOST) pContainer.removeall end if end function
function fill_diagram() dim pCBModule : set pCBModule = doc_.getmodule(60231) dim pContainer : set pContainer = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DIAGRAM_HOST) pContainer.removeall dim dMainDate : dMainDate = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) dim oCalBldrRok : set oCalBldrRok = pCBModule.get_calendar_builder(pContainer,4,dMainDate) oCalBldrRok.extracols = 2 oCalBldrRok.build_frame oCalBldrRok.extracell(-1,1).element(1).text = " d " oCalBldrRok.extracell(-1,2).element(1).text = " h "
dim dDate,dDate1,dDate2 dDate1 = cdate(oCalBldrRok.firstday) dDate2 = cdate(oCalBldrRok.lastday) Dim pKalCP : set pKalCP = doc_.system.activex("navopl.KalCP") pKalCP.init trans_.afc, page_.root, dDate1, dDate2
for dDate = dDate1 to dDate2 oCalBldrRok.currentday = dDate if pKalCP.get_day_info(dDate).is_dzien_rob_plan() then oCalBldrRok.cell.backcolor = colorDzienRob oCalBldrRok.addtext "R" oCalBldrRok.element.tip = "Dzień roboczy" else oCalBldrRok.cell.backcolor = colorDzienWolny end if next dim iter dim nYear : nYear = year(dMainDate) for iter = 1 to 12 dim dD1 : dD1 = dateserial(nYear,iter,1) dim dD2 : dD2 = dateserial(nYear,iter+1,0) oCalBldrRok.extracell(iter,1).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = cstr(pKalCP.dni_rob_plan(dD1,dD2))
oCalBldrRok.extracell(iter,2).addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text =_ cstr(clng(-Int(-pKalCP.min_rob_plan(dD1,dD2)/60))) next end function
function assign_to_contracts dim strWhere : strWhere = "" dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) pM43009.prepare_multi_selection TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA, "Wybór umów", strWhere, "dDataOd" dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = pM43009.run_multi_browser() if not oNXArray is nothing then dim oSubTrans : set oSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran() dim idUmowa for each idUmowa in oNXArray dim oUmowa: set oUmowa = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA, idUmowa) set oUmowa.pKalendarz = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PLKALCP, page_.rootidobj) next end if trans_.saveobjects() end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_PODSTAWOWE,Informacje podstawowe,FORM_SPAN) QXR_EDIT_FIELD_REQ(Nazwa,-1,32,strNazwa,RCELL_SPAN)
QXX_STATUS_RADIO2(eAktywny,RCELL_SPAN) #ifdef _HJORT
QXE_BUTTON(-1,10,Przypisz do umów,varFunction="assign_to_contracts")
#endif QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_POZYCJE,Pozycje,FORM_SPAN)
listPozycje
Rozpoczęcie
Zakończenie
Dni tygodnia
Typ
Data
Czas
Data
Czas
SXE_DATE_FIELD(-1,dDataOd)
SXE_TIME_FIELD(-1,tCzasOd)
SXE_DATE_FIELD(-1,dDataDo)
SXE_TIME_FIELD(-1,tCzasDo)
cDniTyg
poniedziałek wtorek środa czwartek piątek sobota niedziela
eTypOkresu
roboczy wolny wolny ustawowo
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_DIAGRAM,Diagram,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_BUTTON(-1,0,Pokaż diagram,varFunction="fill_diagram",FORM_SPAN)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_MULTILINE(SECID_UWAGI,CTRLID_UWAGI,strUwagi,Uwagi,FORM_SPAN)
QXF_END
